go_runtime_scope: local/copied-DB tags update/delete/merge parity candidate only

create_route_boundary.POST /api/tags: not a current Python API route
create_route_boundary.tag_creation: covered through existing notes create/update/batch tag assignment routes instead of adding a Go-only tag create route

parity_scope: tag rename success and missing-tag errors
tag rename duplicate detection uses route-level COLLATE NOCASE
tag delete removes Note_Tags links before deleting the tag for legacy schemas without tag FK cascade
tag merge validates required fields, empty source list, target-in-source, and missing target rollback/no-mutation cases
tag merge transfers Note_Tags to the target with INSERT OR IGNORE, deletes source tags, and skips missing source ids
tag auto-create through notes tag assignment uses route-level COLLATE NOCASE to avoid case-variant duplicate Tags rows on copied legacy DBs
default Go runtime keeps tag write routes disabled
explicit_non_scope: Pi deploy or Caddy/systemd/frontend route changes

allowed_next_step.reason: Tags parity is closed as a local/copied-DB candidate; the next smallest roadmap item is attachments metadata DB ownership before raw/binary attachment serving.
